questionText: Disclose your total refinery throughput capacity in the reporting year in thousand barrels per day.
questionKo: Disclose your total refinery throughput capacity in the 보고연도 in thousand barrels per day.
simpleHelp: Investors and other data users are interested in understanding the total refinery throughput as it is important for investment analysis, in addition it can provide context for the organizations emissions for the reporting year.

columns.text: Total refinery throughput capacity (Thousand barrels per day)
columns.textKo: Total refinery throughput capacity (Thousand barrels per day)

guidance.text: This question only appears if you select "Downstream" in response to 1.19.
guidance.textKo: This 문항 only appears 만약 you select "Downstream" in response to 1.19.

guidance.text:
General 
For the purpose of this question all types of refinery are included, such as coking, cracking, hydroskimming, topping, condensate splitter and upgrader.
Refinery throughput is considered the capacity for refining crude oil and other feedstocks over a given period.
guidance.textKo: 일반 에 대한 purpose of this 문항 all types of refinery are included, such as coking, cracking, hydroskimming, topping, condensate splitter 및 upgrader. Refinery throughput is considered the capacity for refining crude oil 및 other feedstocks over a given period.

criteria.criteria:
Figure provided in column 'Total refinery throughput capacity (Thousand barrels per day)' - 2 points
A maximum of 2/2 points is available for this question.
criteria.criteriaKo: Figure 입력 in 열 'Total refinery throughput capacity (Thousand barrels per day)' - 2 점 이 문항에서 획득 가능한 최고점은 2/2점입니다.
